[Tue 2026-03-17 10:58 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Correct!

There is a pre-existing test configuration file at day16/test_config.json (contains incorrectly formatted timestamp fields). Please update this file to convert all timestamp fields to ISO 8601 format.
Before I modify `day16/test_config.json`, should the ISO 8601 timestamps include the **`+08:00` timezone offset** (same convention as `q2_timeline.json`), or is any ISO 8601 timezone acceptable?
